translations.### Medium Partner Program 終於對全球(包含台灣)寫作: ### Medium Partner Program is Finally Open to Writers Worldwide (Including Taiwan)!
translations.### 一些 Paywall 付費文章的感想\n\n: ### Some Thoughts on Paywall Paid Articles
translations.### 將文章加入至 Paywall 開始獲得收益\n\n: ### Put Articles Behind Paywall to Start Earning Revenue
translations.#### 2.確保你是 [Medium Member](https://medi: #### 2. Make sure you are a [Medium Member](https://medium.com/manage-membership){:target="_blank"} paying subscriber
translations.#### 3.前往 [Medium Partner Program](https: #### 3. Go to the [Medium Partner Program](https://medium.com/me/partner/dashboard){:target="_blank"} page to apply for membership
translations.*Albania, Algeria, Angola, Antigua and B: *Albania, Algeria, Angola, Antigua and Barbuda, Argentina, Armenia, Australia, Austria, Azerbaijan, Bahamas, Bahrain, Bangladesh, Belgium, Benin, Bhutan, Bolivia, Bosnia and Herzegovina, Botswana, Brunei, Bulgaria, Cambodia, Canada, Chile, Colombia, Costa Rica, Côte d’Ivoire, Croatia, Cyprus, Czech Republic, Denmark, Dominican Republic, Ecuador, Egypt, El Salvador, Estonia, Ethiopia, Finland, France, Gabon, Gambia, Germany, Ghana, Gibraltar, Greece, Guatemala, Guyana, Hong Kong, Hungary, India, Indonesia, Ireland, Israel, Italy, Jamaica, Japan, Jordan, Kazakhstan, Kenya, Kuwait, Laos, Latvia, Liechtenstein, Lithuania, Luxembourg, Macao, Madagascar, Malaysia, Malta, Mauritius, Mexico, Moldova, Monaco, Mongolia, Morocco, Mozambique, Namibia, Netherlands, New Zealand, Niger, Nigeria, North Macedonia, Norway, Oman, Pakistan, Panama, Paraguay, Peru, Philippines, Poland, Portugal, Qatar, Romania, Rwanda, Saint Lucia, San Marino, Saudi Arabia, Senegal, Serbia, Singapore, Slovakia, Slovenia, South Africa, South Korea, Spain, Sri Lanka, Sweden, Switzerland, **Taiwan**, Tanzania, Thailand, Trinidad and Tobago, Tunisia, Turkey, United Arab Emirates, United Kingdom, United States, Uruguay, Uzbekistan, and Vietnam*
translations.*但說來有點好笑，要加入 Medium Partner Program 賺錢之前: *But it's a bit funny that before you can join the Medium Partner Program to earn money, you first need to pay to become a Medium Member (at least $4 per month).*
translations.*自訂網域功能同樣需要你加入 Medium Member 付費會員才能使用。*\: *The custom domain feature also requires you to be a Medium Member with a paid subscription to use.*
translations.*這邊我是使用國泰外幣帳戶，直接進 App 看外幣帳戶資訊然後填上去。(之後可以: *Here, I used a Cathay foreign currency account, directly checked the foreign currency account info in the app, and filled it in. (You can change it later in settings; it seems the verification happens only when the payout is made.)*
translations.- <https://dashboard.stripe.com/register:
- <https://dashboard.stripe.com/register?locale=zh-Hans>{:target="_blank"}

- I registered a long time ago, so I'll skip the registration process below.
translations.- After reviewing and confirming the inf: - After reviewing and confirming the information is correct, click "Continue" to proceed to the next step.
translations.- Business type: I chose \"Individual or: - Business type: I chose "Individual or Sole Proprietorship"
translations.- Check \"Paywall your story\" -> \"Save:
- Check "Paywall your story" -> "Save"

- Articles participating in the revenue share will have a ⭐️.
translations.- Check all boxes, select \"I am signing:
- Check all boxes, select "I am signing for myself.", enter your English name, the current date, and your contact email.

- Finally, click "Submit Form" to submit the entire form.
translations.- Claim of Treaty Benefits (Part II)\n\n:
- Claim of Treaty Benefits (Part II)

- At this step, simply click "Continue" to proceed.

- Click "Confirm" to proceed
translations.- Continue filling in the relevant perso: - Continue filling in the relevant personal information (in English)
translations.- Country Selection \n Choose your cou:
- Country Selection  
  Choose your country. Currently, almost all countries are supported.  
  It is assumed that all countries supported by Stripe for payments are available.
translations.- Enter your personal information (in fu:
- Enter your personal information (in full English)

- **Address: Can be translated using [Chunghwa Post Translation](https://www.post.gov.tw/post/internet/Postal/index.jsp?ID=207#result){:target="_blank"}**
translations.- Identification of Beneficial Owner (Co:
- Identification of Beneficial Owner (Continued)

- In this step, directly check "I can’t claim treaty benefits, so I'm not required to provide a Tax ID Number" and click "Continue".
translations.- If you don't have one, you need to pay: - If you don't have one, you need to subscribe by paying first.
translations.- If you want to let a friend read the f: - If you want to let a friend read the full article for free, you can choose "Copy Friend Link" from Share. This link allows free full access but does not generate any earnings.
translations.- Make sure all three conditions are met: - Make sure all three conditions are met:
translations.- Once an article is placed behind the P:
- Once an article is placed behind the Paywall and becomes a paid article, users must log in and become Medium Members to read the full content. The previously circulating unlimited reading hacks are no longer effective.

- My high-traffic, SEO-friendly articles are mostly unboxings and travelogues; however, the audience is mostly casual visitors who are neither Medium Members nor regular members. They just browse and leave, so these types of articles are not suitable for the Paywall.

- Technical articles are often intended to share information freely and openly, and authors may not consider their content valuable. Additionally, since the audience is mostly industry insiders with low traffic, there is little motivation to add a paywall.  
  **Or provide free links simultaneously so non-Medium Members can also read.**

- Traffic and earnings can be referenced from senior creator [Tenz Shih (施典志)](https://medium.com/u/11162699a102){:target="_blank"}’s [early shared data](https://medium.com/tenzblog/%E5%8A%A0%E5%85%A5medium-payment-program%E4%B8%80%E6%98%9F%E6%9C%9F%E5%B7%A6%E5%8F%B3%E7%9A%84%E6%94%B6%E5%85%A5%E6%83%85%E5%BD%A2-dad68b457d64){:target="_blank"}.

- I have selected a few technical articles with good traffic and content to add to the Paywall for testing (including a free link in the first paragraph, so anyone can read without an account or payment). I will update the results later for your reference.

- I had previously migrated to [self-hosted + Google Adsense](https://zhgchg.li){:target="_blank"} using a tool I developed for conversion, "[Seamless Migration from Medium to Self-Hosted Site](../a0c08d579ab1/)," but I didn't consider paid articles back then, so I need to adjust the script again QQ.
translations.- Payment method: Direct payout via **[S:
- Payment method: Direct payout via **[Stripe](https://wise.com/zh-hk/blog/stripe-vs-paypal#stripe-vs-paypal%E8%B2%BB%E7%94%A8%E6%AF%94%E8%BC%83){:target="_blank"}**, which is similar to Paypal but with lower fees and more focused on payment processing.

- Tax Issues: Non-US citizens only need to fill out a declaration form.
translations.- Review and Submit: After confirming th: - Review and Submit: After confirming the information is correct, click "Agree and Submit"
translations.- Select Tax Form: For non-US citizens w: - Select Tax Form: For non-US citizens without any US status, choose the first option "W-8BEN — for non-US individuals"
translations.- Verify Your Personal Details: Enter yo: - Verify Your Personal Details: Enter your personal information. I was able to pass this step by entering it in Chinese.
translations.- [Medium Custom Domain Feature Returns]:
- [Medium Custom Domain Feature Returns](../d9a95d4224ea/)

- You can follow the steps in the above article to register your own domain and link it to Medium. Result: from <https://medium.com/@zhgchgli>{:target="_blank"} -> [**https://blog.zhgchg.li**](https://blog.zhgchg.li){:target="_blank"}
translations.1. Already a Medium Member ✅\n\n2. Publi:
1. Already a Medium Member ✅

2. Published at least one article in the past six months ✅

3. Region on the allowed list Taiwan ✅
translations.1. Confirm you are at least 18 years old:
1. Confirm you are at least 18 years old

2. Confirm agreement to the terms of use
translations.> *Albania, Algeria, Angola, Antigua and: > *Albania, Algeria, Angola, Antigua and Barbuda, Argentina, Armenia, Australia, Austria, Azerbaijan, Bahamas, Bahrain, Bangladesh, Belgium, Benin, Bhutan, Bolivia, Bosnia and Herzegovina, Botswana, Brunei, Bulgaria, Cambodia, Canada, Chile, Colombia, Costa Rica, Côte d’Ivoire, Croatia, Cyprus, Czech Republic, Denmark, Dominican Republic, Ecuador, Egypt, El Salvador, Estonia, Ethiopia, Finland, France, Gabon, Gambia, Germany, Ghana, Gibraltar, Greece, Guatemala, Guyana, Hong Kong, Hungary, India, Indonesia, Ireland, Israel, Italy, Jamaica, Japan, Jordan, Kazakhstan, Kenya, Kuwait, Laos, Latvia, Liechtenstein, Lithuania, Luxembourg, Macao, Madagascar, Malaysia, Malta, Mauritius, Mexico, Moldova, Monaco, Mongolia, Morocco, Mozambique, Namibia, Netherlands, New Zealand, Niger, Nigeria, North Macedonia, Norway, Oman, Pakistan, Panama, Paraguay, Peru, Philippines, Poland, Portugal, Qatar, Romania, Rwanda, Saint Lucia, San Marino, Saudi Arabia, Senegal, Serbia, Singapore, Slovakia, Slovenia, South Africa, South Korea, Spain, Sri Lanka, Sweden, Switzerland, **Taiwan**, Tanzania, Thailand, Trinidad and Tobago, Tunisia, Turkey, United Arab Emirates, United Kingdom, United States, Uruguay, Uzbekistan, and Vietnam*
translations.> *But it's a bit funny that before you: > *But it's a bit funny that before you can join the Medium Partner Program to earn money, you first need to pay to become a Medium Member (at least $4 per month).*
translations.> *Here, I used a Cathay foreign currenc: > *Here, I used a Cathay foreign currency account, directly checked the foreign currency account info in the app, and filled it in. (You can change it later in settings; it seems the verification happens only when the payout is made.)*
translations.> *The custom domain feature also requir: > *The custom domain feature also requires you to be a Medium Member with a paid subscription to use.*
translations.Review 確認資料無誤後點擊「Continue」下一步\n: After reviewing and confirming the information is correct, click "Continue" to proceed to the next step.
translations.SWIFT / BIC 代碼：輸入你想收款的銀行 SWIFT 代碼，可 [在此查: SWIFT / BIC Code: Enter the SWIFT code of the bank where you want to receive payments. You can [check here](https://swiftcode.info/bankcountryen-taiwan-2/){:target="_blank"}
translations.Select Tax Form：非美過公民無任何美國身份，選擇第一個「W-8BE: Select Tax Form: For non-US citizens without any US status, choose the first option "W-8BEN — for non-US individuals"
translations.[Medium Partner Dashboard](https://mediu: [Medium Partner Dashboard](https://medium.com/me/partner/dashboard){:target="_blank"} or Story Stats will show your Earnings amount.
translations.之前已先轉移到 [自架 + Google Adsense](https://zh: I had previously migrated to [self-hosted + Google Adsense](https://zhgchg.li){:target="_blank"} using a tool I developed for conversion, "[Seamless Migration from Medium to Self-Hosted Site](../a0c08d579ab1/)," but I didn't consider paid articles back then, so I need to adjust the script again QQ.
translations.也因此很多創作者跳槽到其他平台，如 Matters, 方格子 或是自架放廣告獲利: Many creators have switched to other platforms like Matters, Fanggezi, or set up their own sites with ads to earn revenue. In recent years, Medium has indeed lost many Chinese-speaking creators.
translations.以上數據供大家參考。\n\n: The above data is provided for your reference.
translations.以下以個人帳戶、無美國身份為例。\n\n: The following example is based on an individual account without U.S. residency.
translations.全部打勾、勾選「I am signing for myself.」、輸入你的英文: Check all boxes, select "I am signing for myself.", enter your English name, the current date, and your contact email.
translations.參與分潤的文章會有一個 ⭐️。\n: Articles participating in the revenue share will have a ⭐️.
translations.可以參考我之前的文章「 [Medium 自訂網域功能回歸](../d9a95d4: You can refer to my previous article "[Medium Custom Domain Feature Returns](../d9a95d4224ea/)" for registering your own domain and linking it to Medium.
translations.可參考以上文章步驟註冊自己的網域並綁定到 Medium 上，效果：從 <http: You can follow the steps in the above article to register your own domain and bind it to Medium. Result: from <https://medium.com/@zhgchgli>{:target="_blank"} -> [**https://blog.zhgchg.li**](https://blog.zhgchg.li){:target="_blank"}
translations.商家類型：我是選「個人或獨資企業」\n: Business type: I chose "Individual or Sole Proprietorship"
translations.國家選擇你所在的國家，目前幾乎所有國家都開放了\n猜測是支援 Stripe 收款:
Country Selection  
Choose your country. Currently, almost all countries are open.  
It is assumed that countries supported by Stripe for payments are all available.
translations.地區在允許列表 Taiwan ✅\n: Region on the allowed list Taiwan ✅
translations.如果想給朋友免費查看完整文章可從 Share 選擇「Copy Friend Li: If you want to let a friend read the full article for free, you can choose "Copy Friend Link" from Share. This link allows free full access but does not generate any earnings.
translations.完後點擊「Submit Form」送出整份表單。\n: Finally, click "Submit Form" to send the entire form.
translations.審核並提交：確定資料沒問題後點擊「同意並提交」\n: Review and Submit: After confirming the information is correct, click "Agree and Submit"
translations.帳戶持有人姓名：輸入你想收款的銀行帳戶 - 英文姓名(名稱)\n: Account holder name: Enter the English name of the bank account you want to receive payments to
translations.帳號：輸入你想收款的銀行帳戶帳號\n: Account: Enter the bank account number where you want to receive payments
translations.從 2018 年開始在 Medium 寫文章就已經知道 Medium 有 Par: Since I started writing on Medium in 2018, I have known about the Medium Partner Program. However, from 2018, 2019, 2020… year after year, the Medium Partner Program policy remained unchanged, limiting eligible writers to only a few regions (I remember only Singapore and Japan in Asia). Writers outside these regions had a very [complicated](https://medium.com/tenzblog/%E5%9C%A8%E5%8F%B0%E7%81%A3%E5%8A%A0%E5%85%A5medium%E4%BB%98%E8%B2%BB%E7%89%86%E7%9A%84%E6%9A%AB%E8%A1%8C%E6%96%B9%E6%B3%95-6be1d0d999aa){:target="_blank"} process to earn money, requiring VPN access to allowed regions plus accounts or phones from those regions. I previously looked into it but found it too troublesome and unsafe.
translations.我很久以前註冊過了，註冊過程以下省略。\n: I registered a long time ago, so I'll skip the registration process below.
translations.我的高流量、SEO 很好的文章幾乎都是開箱、遊記；但幾乎都是路人，不要說是 Me: My high-traffic, SEO-friendly articles are mostly unboxings and travelogues; however, the audience is mostly casual visitors who are neither Medium Members nor regular members. They just browse and leave, so these types of articles are not suitable for the Paywall.
translations.所以一直對文章能不能獲利看得很淡，有也好、沒有也好，有的話可以拿盈利去實驗、購買: So I have never been too concerned about whether articles can generate income or not. If they do, great; if not, that's fine too. If there is income, I can use it to experiment, buy more services or experiences, and then write articles to share with everyone, creating a continuous cycle.
translations.所有人都可以加入 Medium Partner Program 撰寫文章獲得收益: Anyone can join the Medium Partner Program to write articles and earn revenue.
translations.技術文章因為希望資訊是免費共享公開、也不覺得自己的內容值錢，加上流量不高都是業內:
Technical articles are often intended to share information freely and openly, and authors may not consider their content valuable. Additionally, since the audience is mostly industry insiders with low traffic, there is little motivation to add a paywall.  
**Or provide free links simultaneously so non-Medium Members can also read.**
translations.按「Enroll now」前往下一步。\n\n: Click "Enroll now" to proceed to the next step.
translations.撥款方式：直接透過 **[Stripe](https://wise.com/zh: Payment method: Direct payout via **[Stripe](https://wise.com/zh-hk/blog/stripe-vs-paypal#stripe-vs-paypal%E8%B2%BB%E7%94%A8%E6%AF%94%E8%BC%83){:target="_blank"}**, which is similar to Paypal but with lower fees and more focused on payment processing.
translations.文章加入 Paywall 付費牆成為付費文章後，使用者就必須登入＋加入 Medi: Once an article is placed behind the Paywall and becomes a paid article, users must log in and become Medium Members to read the full content. The previously circulating unlimited reading hacks are no longer effective.
translations.最近 Medium 功能越放越多的，另外一個曾經開放過又關閉的功能 自訂網域，最: Recently, Medium has been adding more features, and another feature that was once available but then closed—custom domains—has now reopened.
translations.有任何問題及指教歡迎 [與我聯絡](https://www.zhgchg.li/: If you have any questions or feedback, feel free to [contact me](https://www.zhgchg.li/contact){:target="_blank"}.
translations.本篇文章從一發佈就加入到 Paywall (目前已移除)，分享一下一個月的成果。: This article was behind the Paywall from the moment it was published (now removed). Here is a summary of the results after one month.
translations.沒有的話要先花錢訂閱加入\n: If you don't have one, you need to pay to subscribe first.
translations.流量 / 收益效果可參考 [施典志 Tenz Shih](https://med: Traffic and earnings can be referenced from senior creator [Tenz Shih (施典志)](https://medium.com/u/11162699a102){:target="_blank"}’s [early shared data](https://medium.com/tenzblog/%E5%8A%A0%E5%85%A5medium-payment-program%E4%B8%80%E6%98%9F%E6%9C%9F%E5%B7%A6%E5%8F%B3%E7%9A%84%E6%94%B6%E5%85%A5%E6%83%85%E5%BD%A2-dad68b457d64){:target="_blank"}.
translations.目前挑了幾篇流量、內容都不錯的技術文章加入到 Paywall 嘗試效果(有在第一: I have selected a few technical articles with good traffic and content to add to the Paywall for testing (including a free link in the first paragraph, so anyone can read without an account or payment). I will update the results later for your reference.
translations.直到最近 2024/08 無意間在 Medium 在後台的 Banner 喵到邀: Until recently, in August 2024, I accidentally saw an invitation banner in the Medium backend to join the Partner Program (I thought, What? Taiwan is still not open for this). After clicking in, I was surprised to find that it is now fully open, and creators from almost all regions can join the Partner Program and earn revenue from every word of their articles.
translations.確定三個條件都達成：\n: Make sure all three conditions are met:
translations.確認同意使用條款\n: Confirm agreement to the terms of use
translations.確認已滿 18 歲\n: Confirm you are at least 18 years old
translations.稅務問題：非美國公民只需要填寫聲明書就可以了。\n: Tax Issues: Non-US citizens only need to fill out a declaration form.
translations.細節文章報表也會顯示有多少付費會員看過。\n\n: The detailed article report will also show how many paying members have read it.
translations.經營 Medium 的初衷不是為了賺錢，是喜歡與大家分享的感覺，分享遇到的技術困: The original intention of running Medium was not to make money, but to enjoy sharing with everyone—sharing technical challenges I encountered, hoping to help developers with similar issues avoid detours, or diving deeper based on my research so I can also learn new knowledge; plus, there are very few Traditional Chinese writers, so I hope to inspire others and create a cycle of mutual learning.
translations.繼續填寫相關個人資訊 (英文)\n: Continue filling in the relevant personal information (in English)
translations.觀察只有 Reads 數量 (付費用戶停留閱讀超過 30 秒)，才會有收益，分配: I noticed that only the number of Reads (paid users staying to read for more than 30 seconds) generates revenue. The payout is not fixed and seems to be distributed based on views, claps, shares, and other factors. My numbers are low, so each Read earns about $0.01 to $0.07.
translations.輸入你的個人資訊 (全英文)\n: Enter your personal information (in full English)
translations.送出後會導頁回 Payout settings 頁面，確認都有 ✅ 就代表加入成: After submission, you will be redirected to the Payout settings page. If everything shows a ✅, it means you have successfully joined!
translations.送出無誤後會再導頁回 Medium 繼續設定稅務資訊。\n\n: After successful submission, you will be redirected back to Medium to continue setting up your tax information.
translations.這一步直接勾選「I can’t claim treaty benefits, s: In this step, directly check "I can’t claim treaty benefits, so I'm not required to provide a Tax ID Number" and click "Continue".
translations.這一步直接點擊「Continue」下一步\n: At this step, simply click "Continue" to proceed.
translations.這樣這篇文章才會有分潤。\n\n: This way, the article will generate revenue sharing.
translations.這邊要注意不是加入 Medium Partner 就能獲得收益，文章要加入到 P: Note that joining the Medium Partner Program alone does not generate earnings; your articles must be placed behind the Paywall to receive revenue shares.
translations.過去六個月中至少發表過一篇文章 ✅\n: Published at least one article in the past six months ✅
translations.首先你要確定你已經有 [Medium Memeber 或 Medium Frie: First, make sure you have a [Medium Member or Medium Friend](https://medium.com/manage-membership){:target="_blank"} membership.
translations.驗證您的個人詳細：輸入個人資料，這邊我用中文輸入可以通過。\n: Verify Your Personal Details: Enter your personal information. I was able to pass this step by entering it in Chinese.
